news.title: Nintendo's finally developing replaceable batteries, so we presumably won't have to bin a Switch because the battery conked out
news.titleEN: Nintendo's finally developing replaceable batteries, so we presumably won't have to bin a Switch because the battery conked out
news.desc: Nintendo has announced it is creating hardware with replaceable batteries, which presumably will include its Switch consoles, due to new EU regulations tackling electronic waste. Read more
news.descEN: Nintendo has announced it is creating hardware with replaceable batteries, which presumably will include its Switch consoles, due to new EU regulations tackling electronic waste. Read more

news.title: "We know players want it. WE want it" - Dune Awakening developers respond to lack of crossplay for console release
